title: tillaeastrum
intro: Tillaeastrum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Tillaeastrum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which can help to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tillaeastrum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs.
